subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath made me a wronged one, a captive in the hands of His servants and His creation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعلنی مظلوما اسیرا بین ایادی عباده و خلقه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for unity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness
